test.create_query: CREATE TABLE rs_right_1k (k UInt64, a Int32, b Int64, c UInt8, d Float64, e UInt32, f Int16, g FixedString(16), h Int8) ENGINE = MergeTree ORDER BY tuple()
CREATE TABLE rs_right_100k (k UInt64, a Int32, b Int64, c UInt8, d Float64, e UInt32, f Int16, g FixedString(16), h Int8) ENGINE = MergeTree ORDER BY tuple()
CREATE TABLE rs_right_10m (k UInt64, a Int32, b Int64, c UInt8, d Float64, e UInt32, f Int16, g FixedString(16), h Int8) ENGINE = MergeTree ORDER BY tuple()
CREATE TABLE rs_right_100m (k UInt64, a Int32, b Int64, c UInt8, d Float64, e UInt32, f Int16, g FixedString(16), h Int8) ENGINE = MergeTree ORDER BY tuple()

CREATE TABLE rs_right_100k_nullable (k UInt64, a Nullable(Int32), b Nullable(Int64), c Nullable(UInt8), d Nullable(Float64), e Nullable(UInt32), f Nullable(Int16), g Nullable(FixedString(16)), h Nullable(Int8)) ENGINE = MergeTree ORDER BY tuple()

CREATE TABLE rs_right_10m_nullable (k UInt64, a Nullable(Int32), b Nullable(Int64), c Nullable(UInt8), d Nullable(Float64), e Nullable(UInt32), f Nullable(Int16), g Nullable(FixedString(16)), h Nullable(Int8)) ENGINE = MergeTree ORDER BY tuple()
CREATE TABLE rs_right_1k_x10 (k UInt64, a Int32, b Int64, c UInt8, d Float64, e UInt32, f Int16, g FixedString(16), h Int8) ENGINE = MergeTree ORDER BY tuple()
CREATE TABLE rs_right_1m_x10 (k UInt64, a Int32, b Int64, c UInt8, d Float64, e UInt32, f Int16, g FixedString(16), h Int8) ENGINE = MergeTree ORDER BY tuple()

CREATE TABLE rs_right_1m_nullable_x10 (k UInt64, a Nullable(Int32), b Nullable(Int64), c Nullable(UInt8), d Nullable(Float64), e Nullable(UInt32), f Nullable(Int16), g Nullable(FixedString(16)), h Nullable(Int8)) ENGINE = MergeTree ORDER BY tuple()
CREATE TABLE rs_right_mixed_10m (k UInt64, a Int32, b Int64, c UInt8, d Float64, s1 String, s2 String, s3 String) ENGINE = MergeTree ORDER BY tuple()
CREATE TABLE rs_probe_200m (k UInt64) ENGINE = MergeTree ORDER BY tuple()
test.fill_query: INSERT INTO rs_right_1k SELECT number, number, number, number, number, number, number, reinterpret(number, 'FixedString(16)'), number FROM numbers(1000) ORDER BY rand()
INSERT INTO rs_right_100k SELECT number, number, number, number, number, number, number, reinterpret(number, 'FixedString(16)'), number FROM numbers(100000) ORDER BY rand()
INSERT INTO rs_right_10m SELECT number, number, number, number, number, number, number, reinterpret(number, 'FixedString(16)'), number FROM numbers(10000000) ORDER BY rand()
INSERT INTO rs_right_100m SELECT number, number, number, number, number, number, number, reinterpret(number, 'FixedString(16)'), number FROM numbers(100000000) ORDER BY rand()

INSERT INTO rs_right_100k_nullable WITH if(number % 7 = 0, NULL, number) AS n, if(number % 7 = 0, NULL, reinterpret(number, 'FixedString(16)')) AS fs SELECT number, n, n, n, n, n, n, fs, n FROM numbers(100000) ORDER BY rand()

INSERT INTO rs_right_10m_nullable WITH if(number % 7 = 0, NULL, number) AS n, if(number % 7 = 0, NULL, reinterpret(number, 'FixedString(16)')) AS fs SELECT number, n, n, n, n, n, n, fs, n FROM numbers(10000000) ORDER BY rand()
INSERT INTO rs_right_1k_x10 SELECT number % 1000, number, number, number, number, number, number, reinterpret(number, 'FixedString(16)'), number FROM numbers(10000) ORDER BY rand()
INSERT INTO rs_right_1m_x10 SELECT number % 1000000, number, number, number, number, number, number, reinterpret(number, 'FixedString(16)'), number FROM numbers(10000000) ORDER BY rand()

INSERT INTO rs_right_1m_nullable_x10 WITH if(number % 7 = 0, NULL, number) AS n, if(number % 7 = 0, NULL, reinterpret(number, 'FixedString(16)')) AS fs SELECT number % 1000000, n, n, n, n, n, n, fs, n FROM numbers(10000000) ORDER BY rand()
INSERT INTO rs_right_mixed_10m WITH concat('s', toString(number)) AS s SELECT number, number, number, number, number, s, s, s FROM numbers(10000000) ORDER BY rand()
INSERT INTO rs_probe_200m SELECT number FROM numbers(200000000) ORDER BY rand()
test.query: SELECT * FROM rs_probe_200m l JOIN rs_right_1k r ON (l.k % toUInt64(1000 / {match_rate})) = r.k FORMAT Null
SELECT * FROM rs_probe_200m l JOIN rs_right_100k r ON (l.k % toUInt64(100000 / {match_rate})) = r.k FORMAT Null
SELECT * FROM rs_probe_200m l JOIN rs_right_10m r ON (l.k % toUInt64(10000000 / {match_rate})) = r.k FORMAT Null

SELECT * FROM rs_probe_200m l JOIN rs_right_100m r ON ((l.k * 2) % toUInt64(100000000 / {match_rate})) = r.k FORMAT Null SETTINGS max_bytes_before_external_join = 0, max_bytes_ratio_before_external_join = 0
SELECT * FROM rs_probe_200m l JOIN rs_right_100k_nullable r ON (l.k % toUInt64(100000 / {match_rate})) = r.k FORMAT Null
SELECT * FROM rs_probe_200m l JOIN rs_right_10m_nullable r ON (l.k % toUInt64(10000000 / {match_rate})) = r.k FORMAT Null
SELECT * FROM rs_probe_200m l ANY JOIN rs_right_100k r ON (l.k % toUInt64(100000 / {match_rate})) = r.k FORMAT Null
SELECT * FROM rs_probe_200m l LEFT JOIN rs_right_100k r ON (l.k % toUInt64(100000 / {match_rate})) = r.k FORMAT Null
SELECT * FROM rs_probe_200m l RIGHT JOIN rs_right_100k r ON (l.k % toUInt64(100000 / {match_rate})) = r.k FORMAT Null
SELECT * FROM rs_probe_200m l FULL JOIN rs_right_100k r ON (l.k % toUInt64(100000 / {match_rate})) = r.k FORMAT Null
SELECT * FROM rs_probe_200m l JOIN rs_right_1k_x10 r ON (l.k % toUInt64(1000 / {match_rate})) = r.k FORMAT Null
SELECT * FROM (SELECT * FROM rs_probe_200m LIMIT 20000000) l JOIN rs_right_1m_x10 r ON (l.k % toUInt64(1000000 / {match_rate})) = r.k FORMAT Null
SELECT * FROM (SELECT * FROM rs_probe_200m LIMIT 20000000) l JOIN rs_right_1m_nullable_x10 r ON (l.k % toUInt64(1000000 / {match_rate})) = r.k FORMAT Null
SELECT * FROM rs_probe_200m l JOIN rs_right_mixed_10m r ON (l.k % toUInt64(10000000 / {match_rate})) = r.k FORMAT Null

SELECT * FROM rs_probe_200m l JOIN rs_right_100k r ON (l.k % toUInt64(100000 / {match_rate})) = r.k FORMAT Null SETTINGS max_bytes_before_external_join = 10000000, max_bytes_ratio_before_external_join = 0
